column2: Cannot automate units outside theatre areas. Edit a theatre and assign these provinces.
With $INFRA$/§G$MAX$§! infrastructure and current technology we can transport §Y$THRU$§! supplies and fuel per day.
Capital and surrounding provinces throughput allows to transport §G$THRU$§! supplies and fuel per day.
Upgraded unit will have at least §G$EXP$§!% experience inherited from previous unit, or more.
Reports are coming in that a Me 163 Komet has been spotting flying over our country. What is it up to? Where did it come from? No one knows, possibly it was some kind of test flight.
